main.description: Create a new space. The authenticated user becomes the space owner. Requires auth, implemented by PDS.

type.description: The NSID of the space type, describing the modality of the space (e.g. app.bsky.group, app.bsky.personal).

skey.description: The space key. Used to differentiate multiple spaces of the same type under the same owner. If not provided, one will be auto-generated (TID).

managingApp.description: Service identifier (e.g. did:web:example.com#forum) of the application that manages this space. Used to route application-level requests (join requests, invite flows, etc.).

isPublic.description: If true, the credential mint is open to anyone and the member list is bypassed for read/sync access.

appAccessMode.description: Default app-level access policy. 'allow' means any app may sync (with optional denylist via appExceptions), 'deny' means only apps in appExceptions may sync. Regardless, syncing apps must have a valid member grant to receive a space credentials.

appExceptions.description: Apps that break from the default appAccessMode. Functions as denylist when appAccessMode is 'allow', allowlist when appAccessMode is 'deny'.

errors.name: SpaceAlreadyExists
errors.description: A space with this owner, type, and skey already exists.

errors.name: InvalidType
errors.description: The provided space type NSID is not a recognized or valid space type.
